name: Nauya, the Ogdoadic Remnant
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>滓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ナイア
desc: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; send 1 LIGHT Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ogdoadic" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nauya, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; send 1 LIGHT Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ogdoadic" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nauya, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.
eff: You can send this card from your hand to the GY; send 1 LIGHT Reptile monster from your Deck to the GY. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Ogdoadic" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Nauya, the Ogdoadic Remnant" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
